reference: Hi! I am nineteen, and I have a puberty question regarding height. My dad is six feet eight inches, and my mom is five feet four inches; I am six feet zero inches. I only have to shave the barest peach fuzz about once every week and a half. I have leg hair, but it basically stops at my knees. All that being background information, I obviously have quite a bit of maturing to do, but should I expect further increases in height, or just a filling in of sorts with hair and the like?
text: Hi! I am 19, and I have a QB question regarding height. My dad is 6 feet 8 inches, and he's 5 feet 4 inches. I am 6 feet 0 inches. I only have to shave the barest peach fuzz about once every week and a half. I have leg hair, but it basically stops at my knees. All that being background information, I obviously have quite a bit of maturing to do. But should I expect further increases in height? Or just a filling in of sorts with hair and the like?
